hooks.command: cd /e/workspace/zoomos_v4 && echo '=== Zoomos v4 ===' && git log --oneline -3 && echo '' && (netstat -ano 2>/dev/null | findstr ':8081' | findstr 'LISTENING' > /dev/null && echo 'Server: RUNNING :8081' || echo 'Server: stopped') && echo ''

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "spring-boot:run" && (netstat -ano 2>/dev/null | findstr ":8081" | findstr "LISTENING" > /dev/null && echo "WARNING: Port 8081 is already occupied! Stop the existing server first with /server stop" >&2 || true) || true'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "db/migration/V" && echo "DOCS REMINDER: New Flyway migration created. Required: 1) Update CLAUDE.md Recent Changes 2) Update relevant docs/ file (if functional change)" || true'
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "git commit" && echo "REMINDER (from CLAUDE.md): After any functional change — update docs/ file. Mandatory last step alongside commit." || true'

cd /e/workspace/zoomos_v4 && CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && UNTRACKED=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | grep '^?' | wc -l) && [ $((CHANGED + STAGED + UNTRACKED)) -gt 0 ] && echo "Modified files: $CHANGED unstaged, $STAGED staged, $UNTRACKED untracked" || true
